channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-27 16:21 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: If they’re willing to die to assassinate, imagine what they will do if they gain political power
item.description: If they’re willing to die to assassinate, imagine what they will do if they gain political power

item.title: @elonmusk: In shocking news, calling your political opponents Nazis makes crazy people want to kill them. Who c...
item.description: In shocking news, calling your political opponents Nazis makes crazy people want to kill them. Who could have predicted this?

item.title: @elonmusk: How do you think the left redistributes wealth? Violence How do you think the left seizes the means ...
item.description: How do you think the left redistributes wealth? Violence How do you think the left seizes the means of production? Violence How do you think they censor and surveil opponents? Violence What do you think the left means by “the struggle”? Violence

item.title: @elonmusk: The core argument of critical race theory is quite literally that any bad thing Blacks or other mino...
item.description: The core argument of critical race theory is quite literally that any bad thing Blacks or other minorities do is white people's fault. The core argument of later-wave feminism is quite literally that any bad thing women do is men's fault. I can point you to chapter and verse here, if you want - i.e., Kendi (2020: 12). These are stupid and untenable ideologies.

item.title: @elonmusk: 25% of very liberal people say political violence can “sometimes be justified.” Among very conservat...
item.description: 25% of very liberal people say political violence can “sometimes be justified.” Among very conservative people it’s just 3%. In other words, the far left is 8x more likely to support political violence as the far right. Stop pretending this is a “both sides” problem. It’s not.

item.title: @elonmusk: They arrested the President of the United States of America 4X, charged him 91X, indicted him 4X, sp...
item.description: They arrested the President of the United States of America 4X, charged him 91X, indicted him 4X, spied on his campaign, sabotaged his first term, jailed his supporters, raided his private residence, censored him, gagged him, tried to bankrupt him, and attempted to remove him from state ballots. When all of that failed they tried to assassinate him not once but four times. And they go on national television to talk about how we need to vote for them to save democracy.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is the 7th consecutive week with new reporting that ChatGPT was used in connection with murder ...
item.description: This is the 7th consecutive week with new reporting that ChatGPT was used in connection with murder or suicide. OpenAI doesn’t “benefit all of humanity.”

item.title: @elonmusk: If extremely violent criminals are not imprisoned, eventually they will murder innocent people
item.description: If extremely violent criminals are not imprisoned, eventually they will murder innocent people

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 NEWS: Emirates upgrades its iconic A380 with Starlink high-speed Wi-Fi, delivering “better-than-ho...
item.description: 🚨 NEWS: Emirates upgrades its iconic A380 with Starlink high-speed Wi-Fi, delivering “better-than-home” internet at 40,000 feet. • Up to 3 Starlink antennas on each A380 for massive speed boost • Internet performance improved up to 1000x vs older systems • Enables streaming, gaming, video calls & real-time work onboard • Rollout begins in 2026 as part of fleet-wide upgrade A major leap in aviation connectivity 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real...
item.description: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real.
